repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest pid_qte_marginal_sensitivity_v1 concerns CQTE envelope certificates, not MSM-CVaR policy welfare

published_prior_art.cite: HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2025SharpOPE gives sharp mean MSM off-policy value; FrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2023GeneralizedCSA gives generalized distributional sensitivity bounds but not the nested randomized-policy CVaR endpoint

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1 studies a rectangular joint-misspecification gap for mean policy value, not coordinatewise distributional-band CVaR non-commutation

published_prior_art.cite: DornGuo2021QuantileBalancing and MastenPoirierRen2025RelaxingUnconfoundedness give sharp pointwise/IPW or QTE/DTE sensitivity objects, not the proposed CVaR non-commutation scalar

repo_prior_art.cite: none; Stat catalogue has unrelated ATE overlap and policy-regret rate frontiers

published_prior_art.cite: DornGuoKallus2021DoublySharp supplies sharp MSM ATE endpoint scores; ImbensManski2004PartialIDCI supplies scalar partial-ID interval logic

repo_prior_art.cite: none as a CausalSmith catalogue entry

published_prior_art.cite: RockafellarUryasev2000CVaR plus standard unconfounded policy-value identification

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The set F_Gamma^pt is not a well-defined class of CDFs: selecting pointwise envelopes separately across thresholds can violate monotonicity unless the band is explicitly constrained to cadlag monotone distributions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: At true nuisances and Gamma>1, the proposed one-step score is not centered for Psi_eta because it subtracts r_eta,a=E[(Y-eta)_+|A=a,X] inside the tilted residual, giving expectation 2 m_eta,a^+ - r_eta,a instead of m_eta,a^+.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Eta-uniform sharpness and the minimax/pasting argument are open at proposal stage.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conjecture 1 is a conditional Stage 0 solve target, not a proved theorem in this proposal.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 3
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The smooth CLT is restricted to a unique robust quantile with positive density near active cutoffs.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Inference claim is accepted only in the smooth unique-optimizer regime; mass-point and directional-differentiability cases are out of v1 scope.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 1 / Conjecture 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Multi-action latent compatibility beyond actionwise MSM operators is not claimed.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The proposal is bound to the actionwise policy-mixture endpoint, not a stronger coupled-action latent-law compatibility theorem.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine F_Gamma^pt as either a monotone cadlag CDF band satisfying pointwise lower/upper inequalities or an explicitly non-distributional coordinatewise envelope functional, then restate Delta_nc against that object.
Repair Definition 1 by deriving the true efficient influence function for the tilted truncated-loss endpoint; at minimum the true-nuisance score must be centered and reduce correctly at Gamma=1.
Add a two-action, three-outcome numerical witness with actual probabilities, Gamma, tau, active eta values, and computed Delta_nc>0.

Sharpen the Conjecture 1 proof route into a concrete minimax chain proving when sup_Q inf_eta equals inf_eta sup_Q, naming the saddle/pasting theorem or finite-support compactness argument that supplies one full-data law.
Add one sentence in Related Work isolating why Frauen et al. generalized distributional CSA does not already imply the randomized-policy CVaR endpoint as a corollary.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle: fix the coordinatewise-band object and the one-step score centering, then rerun the proposal review.
